overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic desert city at sunset. The camera navigates through intersections, highways, and industrial alleys while flying vehicles pass overhead and pedestrians cross the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection at Ash Street with traffic control

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle begins moving forward

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light at Ash Street intersection, then accelerates through the crosswalk as the light turns green

notable_agents.action: person crossing the street in front of the vehicle at the crosswalk

entered.detail: green street sign reading 'Ash' suspended over the intersection
overhead traffic signal showing red then changing to green
row of palm trees lining the left side of the street
large red industrial structure with graffiti on the right side
reddish-brown mountains visible in the distance under hazy sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle is stopped at a red light at the Ash Street intersection in a futuristic desert city. Palm trees line the streets and a large red industrial building stands to the right. As the light turns green, the vehicle begins to move forward through the crosswalk where a pedestrian is crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with flying vehicle traffic overhead

events.description: flying vehicle with billboard passes overhead emitting black smoke

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway, passing other vehicles while a flying AV travels overhead

entered.detail: aerial vehicle with illuminated billboard displaying advertisements, trailing black smoke
brown overhead sign indicating 'Arroyo' exit approaching

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along an open highway with mountains in the background. A flying billboard vehicle passes overhead trailing smoke. The Arroyo exit sign becomes visible as the vehicle continues forward, leaving the Ash Street intersection behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with gas station and commercial buildings

events.description: vehicle turns right at the Arroyo intersection onto a narrower city street

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the Arroyo intersection then proceeding through urban streets lined with tall buildings

notable_agents.action: red van turning at the intersection

entered.detail: fuel station with green and yellow trim and illuminated signage
skyscraper with reflective glass facade visible in the distance
bright yellow industrial barrier wall with metal fencing on top

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the Arroyo intersection into a narrower urban street. A gas station with green trim appears on the left while a yellow industrial wall lines the right. Tall glass towers rise in the distance as the vehicle navigates through the urban canyon, leaving the open highway behind.

events.description: vehicle stops at red light to allow pedestrians to cross the street

agents.ego_description: driving through narrow industrial streets then stopping at a crosswalk to wait for pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicle

entered.detail: large dark industrial building with red neon lighting and garage doors at the end of the street
cluster of external AC units mounted on the industrial building wall
zebra-striped crosswalk with red painted borders

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrow industrial alleyway flanked by concrete buildings with external AC units. Approaching an intersection, the vehicle stops at a red light while multiple pedestrians cross the street at the marked crosswalk. The industrial building ahead features red neon accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from a wide desert intersection into a dense, neon-lit industrial urban canyon. It begins stopped at a red light on Ash Street beside palm trees and a large red industrial building, moving forward through a crosswalk as the light turns green. As the vehicle accelerates onto an open highway with distant mountains, a flying billboard vehicle trails smoke overhead before the camera approaches the Arroyo exit. The scene then shifts as the vehicle turns right, leaving the open road for a narrower street flanked by a green-trimmed gas station and a yellow industrial wall while tall glass towers rise in the distance. Finally, the path tightens into a narrow industrial alleyway of concrete buildings and AC units, coming to a halt at a red light where pedestrians cross before a building with red neon accents.
